submitLeave.title: Submit Sick Leave
submitLeave.uploadSubtitle: Drag and drop files here, or click to browse
submitLeave.acceptedTypes: Images (JPG, PNG) and PDF — Max 10MB per file
submitLeave.multipleFiles: You can upload multiple files at once
submitLeave.uploadTip: 💡 Upload all related documents: sick leave certificate, financial receipt, prescription, lab results, X-rays, hospital reports, and any other supporting documents. Our system will automatically identify and classify each document.
submitLeave.commentsPlaceholder:
Write any information you want the company doctor to know:
• Why you visited this specific doctor or center
• If it was an emergency or urgent case
• Any special circumstances
• Whether this is related to a previous condition
• Anything relevant to your sick leave
submitLeave.pleaseUploadDocument: Please upload at least one document
submitLeave.aiAnalyzedDocuments: 🤖 Our system analyzed your documents and extracted the following information. Please review and correct any errors.
submitLeave.blockedFacility: ⛔ THIS FACILITY IS BLOCKED. Sick leaves from this facility are NOT approved and WILL be rejected per company policy.
submitLeave.ruleViolationGP: ⚠️ RULE VIOLATION: General Practitioner can issue maximum 24 hours (1 day) only. Your leave is {{}} days. This WILL be flagged and likely rejected or partially approved.
submitLeave.ruleWarningSpecialist: ⚠️ Note: Specialist maximum is 48 hours (2 days) unless hospitalized or chronic disease with full supporting documents.
submitLeave.private24hWarning: ⛔ ATTENTION: Sick leaves from 24-hour private medical centers are NOT APPROVED per company policy and WILL BE REJECTED. Please reconsider if this is the correct facility type.

submitLeave.chronicDisease: This is a chronic disease requiring long treatment
submitLeave.lowConfidenceWarning: Fields with ⚠️ have lower confidence — please verify
submitLeave.missingPrescription: 🟡 Prescription not detected — may delay processing
submitLeave.confirmationText: I confirm that all information provided is accurate and all documents are authentic. I understand that any modification or falsification of medical documents will result in immediate rejection and disciplinary action.

submitLeave.dragDrop: Drag & drop your medical documents here
submitLeave.commentHelper: Your explanation helps the company doctor make a fair decision
submitLeave.aiSystemAlert: Your documents will be analyzed by our AI system to extract information automatically. You can review and correct any errors in the next step.

rules.title: Company Rules & Regulations
rules.subtitle: Jordan Aviation Sick Leave Policy
rules.rule1Content: A General Practitioner (GP) can issue a maximum of 1 day (24 hours) sick leave. Any GP leave exceeding 1 day will be rejected or partially approved (1 day only).
rules.rule2Content: A Specialist can issue maximum 2 days (48 hours). Exceptions: Hospitalization OR chronic disease with full supporting documents (X-rays, lab tests, admission reports).
rules.rule3Content: Private medical centers operating 24 hours are BLOCKED. Sick leaves from these facilities will be automatically rejected with a penalty applied.
rules.rule3Examples: Examples: Al-Shifa 24h Center, Night Care Center — leaves will be REJECTED
rules.penaltyNote: Rejected leave period = UNPAID + penalty applied to account
rules.penaltyWarn: Three violations may lead to disciplinary action and further HR review
rules.rule6Point1: The company doctor can request an in-person examination before making a decision.
rules.rule6Point2: Employee MUST attend the scheduled appointment.
rules.rule6Point3: Failure to attend = Automatic rejection per Rule 6 and a penalty is applied.
rules.rule7Title: Rule 7: Zero Tolerance for Tampered Documents
rules.rule7Alert: ZERO TOLERANCE for modified or altered medical documents
rules.rule7Point1: AI system detects tampering during document analysis.
rules.rule7Point2: Immediate rejection if tampering is detected.
rules.rule8Subtitle: Jordan Aviation Sick Leave Entitlement per Article 65 of the Labour Law

decision.ruleViolation1: Specialist exceeded 48 hours (3 days, max is 2 days)

decision.ruleInfo1: First visit to this facility by this employee
decision.aiConclusionText: Based on the analysis, the leave request shows moderate compliance. The specialist has issued a 3-day leave which exceeds the 48-hour maximum. However, the diagnosis appears medically justified with supporting documents. Recommend partial approval (2 days) unless hospitalization evidence is provided.
decision.partialReasonRules: Per company rules — Specialist maximum 48 hours
decision.overrideAlert: You are overriding the following rule violations:
decision.overrideAuthority: As company doctor, you have final medical authority on leave decisions.
decision.overrideReasonPlaceholder: Explain why you are overriding the rules...
decision.examPurposePlaceholder: Describe what you want to evaluate...
decision.examProcessNote: After submitting: (1) Status → EXAMINATION_REQUESTED (2) Admin sends appointment email (3) You decide after examination (4) No-show → Auto Rejection per Rule 6
decision.medicalAssessmentPlaceholder: Enter your professional medical assessment of this leave request...
decision.submitHint: Select a decision and fill in the medical assessment to submit
decision.submitSuccess: Decision submitted successfully. Redirecting to queue...
decision.confirmWarning: This action cannot be undone. Please review carefully before confirming.
